seoTitle: Ora Banda vs Orana — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Ora Banda and Orana. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Ora Banda vs Orana: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ora Banda and Orana.
heading: Ora Banda vs Orana — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ora Banda, Western Australia and Orana, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ora Banda has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Orana (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ora Banda or Orana safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ora Banda has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Orana scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ora Banda scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. Orana scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ora Banda or Orana?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ora Banda has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.27% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
